name: Groundhog D-Day
description: Strap on a jetpack and blast your way through enemy defenses in this action-packed shooter.

name: Jacksmith
description: Man the forge and craft weapons for your animal warriors in this strategy crafting game.

name: Mimelet
description: Steal powers to overcome obstacles in this cute and clever puzzle platformer.

name: Rubble Trouble Tokyo
description: Demolish buildings in Tokyo using various explosive tools without destroying the protected ones.

name: Avalanche
description: Jump and climb up the falling blocks to survive the endless avalanche.

name: Black Knight
description: Collect taxes and smash peasants to please the king in this classic arcade game.

name: Cactus McCoy
description: Punch, shoot, and whip your way through enemies as a cursed walking cactus.

name: Cactus McCoy 2
description: The epic sequel! Journey through the wild west to find the ruins of Calavera.

name: Cursed Treasure
description: Protect your precious gems from the heroes in this legendary tower defense game.
file: Cursed Treasure - Dont Touch My Gems tower defense game.swf

name: Deep Freeze (Hacked)
description: Freeze your enemies and push them away in this wintery arcade classic (Invincibility mode).

name: FireBoy & WaterGirl 1: Forest Temple
description: Work together to explore the Forest Temple, solve puzzles, and collect diamonds.

name: FireBoy & WaterGirl 2: Light Temple
description: Use mirrors and light beams to navigate through the complex Light Temple.

name: FireBoy & WaterGirl 3: Ice Temple
description: Venture into the freezing Ice Temple where mechanics are slippery and frozen.

name: FireBoy & WaterGirl 4: Crystal Temple
description: Master the art of teleportation using crystal portals across the Crystal Temple.

name: Gravity Guy
description: Flip gravity to run on ceilings and floors to escape your relentless pursuer.
